ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing governance accountability structures for AI and data initiatives, including role definition, responsibility assignment, oversight mechanisms, and responsible AI governance frameworks.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — included on balance: skill contains GOV-relevant signals ("ai governance", "responsible ai") within a Leadership & Strategy context (affinity 0.25). STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). A IC Data Governance Analyst would encounter this competency in governance practice.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 3 job-posting-level and 1 certification-level matches (CDMP, DAMA, IAPP, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001). Competency appears regularly in Data Governance Analyst role descriptions and/or governance certification curricula.
